body_txt: Capes: the ultimate fashion accessory. Whether they're the mark of a hero or an indicator of evil , they're always cool and badass , right? Wrong. A somewhat postmodern take on capes; that they are Cool, but Inefficient . Not only that, but they're a liability, with a nasty habit of getting tripped over, snagged on things, caught in jet turbines or grabbed by pragmatic enemies during a fight , leading to inconvenience or worse. Never don one unless you're a master of the art of Giving Them the Strip . Often shows up during Superhero deconstructions/parodies, specifically with regards to the Superheroes Wear Capes / Badass Cape tropes. Surprisingly Realistic Outcome can come into play here. See also: Not Wearing Tights (where the characters refuse costumes entirely), Killer Outfit (when it's the rest of your wardrobe trying to take you out) and Pinned to the Wall .
